endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Stream Analytics related operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs
endpoints.description: Lists all of the streaming jobs in the given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs
endpoints.description: Lists all of the streaming jobs in the specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}
endpoints.description: Gets details about the specified streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}
endpoints.description: Creates a streaming job or replaces an already existing streaming job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing streaming job. This can be used to partially update (ie. update one or two properties) a streaming job without affecting the rest the job definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/start
endpoints.description: Starts a streaming job. Once a job is started it will start processing input events and produce output.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.StreamAnalytics/streamingjobs/{jobName}/stop
endpoints.description: Stops a running streaming job. This will cause a running streaming job to stop processing input events and producing output.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{JOBNAME}} with a real jobname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
